steps.title: Translate the given information into two constraints
steps.content:
Maya's trip involves two key pieces of information:
  • Time: The drive took 6 hours total, so the first equation is x + y = 6
  • Distance: The trip was 330 miles total. We'll use distance = speed × time to build the second equation

steps.title: Build the distance equation using distance = speed × time
steps.content:
For each segment of the trip:
  • Highway: 60 mph × x hours = 60x miles
  • Local roads: 45 mph × y hours = 45y miles
Since the total distance is 330 miles:
$$60x + 45y = 330$$
Pairing this with the time equation $x + y = 6$ gives the listed system $60x + 45y = 330$ and $x + y = 6$, so B is correct.
